summary: Completed testing of Copay Checkbox and QR Pickup Scanner features. All 9 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI testing confirmed copay checkbox properly disables/enables POD button, and QR scanner opens correctly from Pick Ups tab with 'Pickup' action badge.

backend: GET /api/driver-portal/deliveries - Returns orders for driver - PASSED
POST /api/orders/scan - Endpoint exists and validates QR codes - PASSED
POST /api/orders/scan with action=pickup - Changes order status from ready_for_pickup to picked_up - PASSED
GET /api/admin/orders - Orders have copay fields - PASSED
Driver deliveries returns orders with QR codes for pickup/delivery - PASSED
frontend: Driver Portal loads with 3 tabs (Deliveries, Pick Ups, Completed)
Deliveries tab shows cards with 'Did you collect copay?' checkbox
Copay checkbox unchecked -> Complete POD button DISABLED (grayed out)
Copay checkbox checked -> Complete POD button ENABLED (green)
Helper text 'Check the copay box to enable POD' shown when checkbox unchecked
Pick Ups tab shows orders with status: new, pending, confirmed, ready_for_pickup
Pickup card shows 'Scan for Pickup' button (blue)
Clicking 'Scan for Pickup' opens QR Scanner modal
QR Scanner modal shows 'Pickup' action badge
QR Scanner has 'Open Camera Scanner' button
QR Scanner has manual QR code input field
Manual QR scan triggers pickup and changes order status to picked_up
Success toast 'Package scanned successfully!' shown after scan

critical_code_review_comments: Copay checkbox is properly implemented on each DeliveryCard component
POD button correctly uses disabled state based on copay checkbox value
QR Scanner modal correctly receives 'pickup' action prop from PickupCard component
/api/orders/scan endpoint correctly handles pickup action and updates order status
Backend properly changes status from ready_for_pickup to picked_up on pickup scan
seed_data_creation: Created test orders with ready_for_pickup status for QR scan testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Copay checkbox and QR Pickup scanner features are fully functional. Copay checkbox appears on all delivery cards (orders with out_for_delivery/in_transit/assigned status) and must be checked to enable Complete POD button. Pick Ups tab shows orders with status new/pending/confirmed/ready_for_pickup and each has 'Scan for Pickup' button that opens QR Scanner with pickup action. Backend /api/orders/scan endpoint handles pickup scans and changes order status to picked_up.

copay_checkbox.location: Driver Portal -> Deliveries tab -> Each delivery card
copay_checkbox.behavior: Checkbox unchecked = POD disabled, Checkbox checked = POD enabled

pickup_qr_scanner.location: Driver Portal -> Pick Ups tab -> Each pickup card -> Scan for Pickup button
pickup_qr_scanner.behavior: Opens QR Scanner modal with 'Pickup' action badge

mocked_apis.Google Maps API: Configured but uses mock data for testing
